variants.name: Baseline (exact schole.ai replica)
variants.thesis: Exact Framer snapshot of schole.ai's live landing page — the control arm every other variant is measured against.

sections.headline: Faster competency. Higher engagement. Agentic Learning with Scholé.
sections.body: Scholé uses the best of AI to construct exactly the right lesson for each learner. It's targeted, practical, and built on 10+ years of AI-for-education research from EPFL and UC Berkeley.

sections.headline: Learn the new way with Scholé
sections.body: Scholé is a multi-agent pedagogical engine for adaptive and personalized learning. No more one-size-fits-all courses.

sections.headline: The adoption gap is real. Scholé closes it.
sections.body: You bought the tools — ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini, Claude. But if employees don't know how to use them in their daily work, you're not getting the return. Scholé helps every employee understand why AI is relevant to their role.

sections.headline: Learning that adapts to each person
sections.body: Every employee follows a path built around their tools, skills, and pace. The lesson content adjusts in real time as they progress.

items.title: Adapts in real time
items.detail: Lesson content adjusts as each learner progresses.

items.title: Content tied to daily work
items.detail: Every lesson maps to the learner's actual tools — Notion, Excel, PowerPoint — and job function.

items.title: Measurable outcomes
items.detail: Completion rates, mastery levels, and adoption metrics, trackable in natural language from day one.

sections.headline: What your employees get
sections.body: Ask Olé, an AI tutor team that adjusts to each learner — never too easy, never too hard. Skill scores updated after every lesson, XP and level-ups that reward consistency. 2-minute micro-lessons on mobile, desktop, text, audio, and video.

sections.body: Decathlon Switzerland and the Harvard Data Science Initiative use Scholé today.

sections.headline: Ready to turn AI tools into real AI adoption?
sections.body: Whether you're preparing for the EU AI Act or want your teams to use AI with clarity and confidence, Scholé helps you move from awareness to measurable adoption. 20 minutes, live with a founder.

variants.name: HR & L&D buyer (dashboard-led)

sections.headline: Stop reporting completion rates. Start proving AI adoption.
sections.body: Scholé's HR dashboard turns AI training into numbers your CFO respects: adoption rate, mastery level, and time to skill for every team and every tool, trackable in natural language from day one.

sections.headline: Learn the new way with Scholé
sections.body: Scholé is a multi-agent pedagogical engine for adaptive and personalized learning. No more one-size-fits-all courses.

sections.headline: Completion certificates don't survive a budget meeting.
sections.body: Most L&D teams can show who finished a course. Almost none can show who changed how they work. That gap is why learning budgets get cut, and why L&D is not in the room when priorities get set.

sections.headline: Insights your LMS admin can't give you
sections.body: Ask questions in plain language and get answers about real adoption for every team and every tool, ready before your next QBR.

sections.headline: The EU AI Act made AI literacy mandatory. Scholé makes it auditable.
sections.body: Role-specific AI literacy for your entire workforce, live this quarter, with per-employee evidence that regulators and boards can read.

sections.headline: Article 4 requires AI literacy. Generic training won't pass audit.
sections.body: Providers and deployers must ensure sufficient AI literacy that accounts for technical knowledge, experience, and context of use. A one-size-fits-all webinar does not meet that bar.

variants.name: Executive adoption gap (problem-first)
variants.thesis: Same schole.ai layout; hero swaps to the live site's mid-page adoption-gap headline, with problem and how sections agitating on the gap.

sections.headline: Most companies have AI. Very few turn it into measurable impact.
sections.body: You bought ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini, Claude. The subscriptions are active. Ask most employees what changed in their daily work, and the answer is: not much. Scholé closes that gap.

sections.headline: The fix: meet employees where they already are
sections.body: Scholé's multi-agent engine builds each employee's path around their actual role and daily tools like Notion, Excel, PowerPoint, and Slack. 2 minute micro-lessons that fit inside the workday.

sections.headline: The adoption gap, in your own numbers.
sections.body: 83% of HR leaders believe their company supports AI learning. Only 64% of employees agree. Half of your workforce says workload leaves no room for training at all. Meanwhile the licenses renew, and the productivity gains stay theoretical.

sections.headline: Learning that adapts to each person
sections.body: Every employee follows a path built around their tools, skills, and pace. The lesson content adjusts in real time as they progress.

sections.headline: Ten years of learning science research. Now a product.
sections.body: Scholé was built inside EPFL's Machine Learning for Education Lab and UC Berkeley by researchers with 40+ papers on personalized learning, LLMs, and knowledge tracing. Not another AI wrapper. The actual research, productized.

sections.headline: What a pedagogical engine actually does
sections.body: Scholé models each learner's knowledge state in real time, using the same knowledge tracing research the founders published for a decade, and only generates lesson content it can ground in validated knowledge.

sections.headline: The adoption gap is real. Scholé closes it.

sections.headline: Learning that fits your workday. Finally.
sections.body: 2 minute lessons built around your actual job and the tools you already use. An AI tutor that meets you exactly where you are. No lecture halls, no 45 minute modules, no generic Intro to AI.

sections.headline: Learn the new way with Scholé
sections.body: Scholé is a multi-agent pedagogical engine for adaptive and personalized learning. No more one-size-fits-all courses.

sections.headline: This is about making you faster. Not replacing you.
sections.body: AI is reshaping every role, including yours. The people who thrive are the ones who make AI do their boring work. Scholé teaches you to use ChatGPT, Copilot, and Claude on your real tasks.

report.insights: Generation 0: v4-credibility (Technical evaluator (research + integration)) led with 2.7% conversion and fitness 45.9. The biggest conversion blocker pool-wide was roi_proof (2773 lost visitors). The press section lost the most traffic (63% exit). The features section drew the strongest sentiment (1.30).

findings.finding: v0-baseline (Baseline (exact schole.ai replica)) was the weakest page.
roi_proof is the dominant unresolved objection across the pool.
findings.evidence: 2773 lost visitors cited roi_proof at exit; next is employee_adoption (1776).

findings.finding: The press section on v1-roi bleeds the most traffic.
The features section on v1-roi resonated most.

scorecards.summary: EU compliance lead (AI Act-led): 2.1% conversion, fitness 37.5.

decisions.reason: P(best)=34.7%, expected loss 0.675pp — evidence insufficient for a promote/kill decision (n=1848). Confidence capped to ~240 effective visits (6 independent readings) — raw visit count would overstate certainty.

P(best)=21.7%, expected loss 0.980pp — evidence insufficient for a promote/kill decision (n=755). Confidence capped to ~240 effective visits (6 independent readings) — raw visit count would overstate certainty.

P(best)=21.8%, expected loss 0.966pp — evidence insufficient for a promote/kill decision (n=895). Confidence capped to ~240 effective visits (6 independent readings) — raw visit count would overstate certainty.

P(best)=6.9%, expected loss 1.561pp — evidence insufficient for a promote/kill decision (n=521). Confidence capped to ~240 effective visits (6 independent readings) — raw visit count would overstate certainty.
